steps.title: Connect music to feeling
steps.content: The passage repeatedly describes Padre Florentino's music as sad and mournful, then explains that he gave free rein to the sadness in his heart. The central idea links the mood of the music to his own emotions.

steps.title: Reject narrower readings
steps.content: A focuses only on the setting. B invents a preference for playing rather than listening. C treats his musical skill as the main point, but the passage centers on emotional expression. The sadness of the music reflects his feelings. The answer is D.
